title: Palace Beautiful
subtitle: Rest that prepares courage
intro: At the summit, lamplight spills from a house where pilgrims are not shamed for being tired.
Here rest is not escape. It is obedience to the One who knows what waits in the valley.
Listen to Watchful, read the records, and take up the armour of faith before accusation learns your name again.
spiritual_theme: Fellowship, holy rest, and preparation for accusation
core_mechanic: Rest, receive Watchful's counsel, read the testimony of former pilgrims, and take up armour before descending into the Valley of Humiliation.
